# Repository Instructions

## AI Agent Configuration

This repository uses shared agent configuration.

Canonical files:

- `AGENTS.md` — repository instructions
- `.agents/skills/` — skill definitions

Compatibility aliases:

- `CLAUDE.md` → `AGENTS.md`
- `.claude/skills/` → `.agents/skills/`

AI agents should use the canonical files as the source of truth.

Do not modify compatibility aliases directly.
